feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Problem with data types of DOX Payment Advice Data Type in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to process a payment advice automatically by using SAP BPA and Document Information Extraction with the Extract Data (Pre-trained Model) for Payment Advices.

I always get an error log mentioning a discrepancy in data types. From what I understand, DOX's is giving the item 'netAmount' as a number as output but the netAmount.value in DOX SDK is actually formatted as a string.

Attached some screenshot for better understanding.

Output of automation job:

Error Log:

 

I think the discrepancy is already coming from the data types before.

Best wishes and kind regards

Till

entry.title: Multiple alerts for HDB version upgrade, etc. from SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP
entry.content:
We are receiving recurring multiple alert emails for HDB version upgrade and HDB patch upgrade, HDB end of maintenance like every 4 hours. We catch all alert notifications to notify for all events. Accordingly we receiving it. We do not want to hit the multiple recurring mails in our mail box. How to stop receiving these emails?

Thanks

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to access the subaccount in the Europe (Frankfurt) region
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we are unable to access the subaccount in the Europe (Frankfurt) region and getting the below issue.

Note : We are able to access the subaccount of Australia region.

Could you please give us any suggestion and help us on this issue.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Unable to access SAP BTP Global Account
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are unable to access SAP BTP Global Account and getting the below issue.

Could you please give us any suggestion and help us on this issue.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: How to call API endpoint on BTP nodejs app from another BTP app?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a BTP NodeJS application (A) which needs to make a REST call to another BTP application (B) at a regular interval.

In the mta.yaml file for app (A) I have specified the following resource which links to the exposed service of app (B):

  - name: app_a_using_app_b_api
    type: configuration
    parameters:
      provider-nid: mta
      provider-id: <app B name>:<app B exposed service>
      version: ">=0.0.0"

This resource has been added as a required resource for app (A) module:

  - name: app_a_srv
    type: nodejs
    path: .
    requires:
      - name: app_a_db
      - name: app_a_using_app_b_api
        group: destinations       
        properties:
          forwardAuthToken: false
          name: app_b_api
          url: ~{url}         
          timeout: 30000


In app (A) package.json I then specified the destination: 

  "cds": {
    "requires": {
      "middlewares": true,
      "app_b_api": {
        "kind": "destination",
        "credentials": {
          "destination": "app_b_api"
        }
      }
    }
  }

Within app (A), at a regular interval, the following function is then called:

    async doRequestToAppB() {
        try {
            const destination = await getDestination({ destinationName: "app_b_api" });
            const data = await executeHttpRequest(destination, {
                method: 'GET',
                url: "/api/ping"
            });

            logger.info(`Request OK: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);
        } catch (err) {
            logger.error(`Request FAILED: ${err}`);
        }
    }

This request now fails with the following error in the catch-clause:

[app_a] - Request FAILED: TypeError: Converting circular structure to JSON
    --> starting at object with constructor 'TLSSocket'
    | property '_httpMessage' -> object with constructor 'ClientRequest'
    --- property 'socket' closes the circle

I have tried many ways, but somehow I don't seem to be able to have app (A) automatically do a request to app (B), failing with the above error...

I also tried to debug the executeHttpRequest function from within BAS, but that did not give me any clues either.

If anyone has any clues, ideas, directions or tips on how to solve this, that will be highly appreciated!

Thanks in advance,

Robin van het Hof

entry.title: SAP technologies - Adopt, use, no use anymore
entry.content:
Community,

A couple of weeks  ack I saw a post on the community about a new feature released by SAP which shows a kind of map diagram with sap technologies recommended to adopt, other ones that could be still used and other ones to start thinking about not using anymore.

Anyone aware of it? Not able to find it anymore. :).

Thanks,

entry.title: integration: Workzone/Cloud Identity Services/Azure AD/Ariba
entry.content:
Hi there.
I have a problem. I need to integrate Cloud Identity Services with Ariba and Azure AD so that after authentication I can access the workzone.
Using the authentication conditional, I can authenticate through the user's domain to which Azure Ad belongs. However, with Ariba, I cannot do a conditional as it does not have its own domain, so the solution was to load the IAS with Ariba user data by introducing a group and by identifying this group (which is the same one that will be set in the conditional) you will be able to identify that the user is from Ariba and validate it in Ariba.
However, the load made in IAS may not be the same load that is in Ariba, in which case there may not be a match.

To solve this problem, I would have to insert a landpage in which one button would be for Azure AD (internal users) and another button for Ariba (external users), and by clicking on them I could do the SSO correctly.

However, I am unable to find an example of how to do this, because according to the documentation provided by sap, I have not yet managed to achieve a positive test.

Here is the documentation:
https://help.sap.com/docs/identity-authentication/identity-authentication/use-allow-identity-authentication-users-log-on-option

I would need some guidance, or some suggestion so that I can solve this problem without having to burden the IAS.

I thought that leaving Ariba as the default in Cloud Identity Services, I would use an external service that can validate me in Azure AD and redirect me to the Portal, without the need to use the IDP in Cloud Identity Services. But also, I couldn't find an example or anything like that.

Any suggestion, idea, or experience (if by chance, you have gone through the same scenario) is very welcome.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: UI5 free style app with odatav2 and odatav4 service consumption
entry.content:
Hi folks,
I need to develop a ui5 free style app which needs to consume odata v4 (sap capm) service as well as odata v2(on premise) service. As this is my first time dealing with this type of scenario, Just wanted to know that Is there any problems that I may encounter while developing? And is it okay to use 2 different versions of odata in same application.

Thanks in Advance.

Regards

Rakesh

Rakesh Baggam

entry.title: Is there an API for maintaining Decisions in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
SAP Build Process Automation currently provides an API to invoke Decisions, which enables a Decision to be consumed from an application, such as a CAP or UI5 application. 

I would like to know if an API is available to maintain Decisions?  The use case is to allow business users to maintain the business rule entries in a Decision Table from a custom Fiori/UI5 app to provide a purpose-built user experience rather than exposing the SAP Build Process Automation Cloud Studio Decision Builder UI directly to business users.

I thought I saw this as an upcoming feature on the SBPA Road Map but its seems to have dropped off.  Any insights would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Extended Planning and Analysis
entry.content:
Hi,

Learning more about BTP by learning about the solutions it provides, why S4 Hana solutions such as SAP S/4 Hana for advanced ATP solution is listed under Extended Planning and Analysis -> Supply Chain Planning as BTP solution. what' s the rationale behind it ?

https://www.sap.com/india/products/technology-platform/solutions.html#active_tab_item_1647451362727

https://www.sap.com/india/products/scm/supply-chain-planning.html#sap-s4hana-advanced-atp

Rest of the solution areas - Application Development and Automation, Artificial Intelligence, Data and Analytics and Integration are locatable in SAP Discovery Center where as not of Extended Planning and Analysis, again what' s the connect for putting up these solutions (Extended Planning and Analysis) under BTP ?

Regards,

Vipin.

entry.title: SAP Automation Pilot error : execution has failed
entry.content:
I am getting error while doing  Mass Restart Cf Apps command in sap automation pilot:

[invalid_grant] Failed to obtain oAuth 2.0 token: User authentication failed: Unauthorized Token  Response code: 401

I am getting same error while trying any command.

#SAP Automation Pilot

entry.title: How to default list picker value in SAP MDK
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to make list picker value as a default value from the available value in the list picker. The list picker is bind with entity set - Movement type, there is four value available for example 201,202,203,204. I am trying to make 202 as default selected value in list picker.

Could you please help me on this how can I achieve this.

Thanks.

entry.title: IRPA_CORE.TIMEOUT: Waiting for element_uI5Element_1
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I have been trying to automate a Fiori App using the recorder in SAP BTP.  The subjected error is happening for few apps, the one I have attached screenshot is Manage Product Master Data. I have cross checked the captures, it has perfectly captured the screen and the UI5_element as well, but still it ends with error that waiting for ui5_element. I have tried incrementing the activities time for 30s to more, still it's same. 

Please if anyone can suggest way to correct this, it will be really appreciated. 

Thanks

entry.title: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I am currently involving on a SAP S/4HANA Public Edition implementation and we have some requirements that requires custom development. These developments must built using SAPUI5. I would like confirming if it is possible to implement these developments on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public. I have looked at documentation for that, but I have not found definitively answer.

Best regard,

Anthony

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori SAP ERP SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Any Online Editor Available for Groovy SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Are there any alternative online SAP CPI Groovy editors available besides https://groovyide.com/cpi? The https://groovyide.com/cpi server is currently unavailable.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Service Marketplace is missing
entry.content:
Hi, 

I've recently ran into an issue where my service marketplace is not showing on the sap cockpit trial account anymore. I've been using cockpit for about a year now always renewing the 90day trial but this is the first time I came into the issue. 
I have about 20days left of the trial and it just disappeared yesterday, I haven't changed my roles or anything. 
When I set up this trial account, I set it up for integration suite so I can learn CPI, I had the service market place since then but its just gone now?
I saw some people on the community with this issue and their resolution were role based but I can't figure it out even with adding and removing role collections, etc.

entry.title: How to develop an API-Endpoint with CAP?
entry.content:
I created a simple OData v.4 API with Node.js CAP. Let's call it simpleapi-srv.

If I open the application route for this api in the browser I get the following error message: 401 - Unauthorized.

I therefore created another application simpleapi based on the standalone app router. If I open the application route of this app I can login with my BTP user (and sucessfully work with the API). I understand by calling the app with the standalone app router the app router handles (with the help of the xsuaa) service the SAML / OAuth flow and ensures (via re-direction) the login process.

My question:
How can I provide an API-URL to an external partner and how do I grant him corresponding authorization? So e.g. he can use the API endpoint via postman or within his custom application development (outside BTP).

Does it make sense to create a service key for simpleapi and use the OAuth credentials from the key? How do I manage authorization (scopes and roles). I assume the CDS role defintion do not have any effect for the user in the service key....?

entry.title: Analytic privilige issue in Embedded SAC
entry.content:
We are using Live connection configuration based on HANA Analytics Adapter between Embedded SAC & our BTP (HANA Cloud DB). Connection is working fine and it is able to bring the data from source to target which is E-SAC in this case.

We want to enable row level authorization or Dynamic authorization based on user login in the reporting layer where we are using Analytic privileges in HANA calculation view with Dynamic restrictions based on Procedure.

Analytic Privilege is working fine as is expected to be however in E-SAC we found that reports are running based on DB runtime user rather than currently logged user. Eg: If I login in SAC then SAC should recognise my user ID which is Subash in this case however it is getting data based on runtime user or session user.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Do we have a certificate for datasphere? thanks ~
entry.content:
Hi team,

In our available certificate list, I can't find any certificate is related to datasphere. So, do we have plan to onboard a new certificate for datasphere or please point me to a existing one.

Thanks

entry.title: Error while creating user with Identity Directory API in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to create external user id using Identity Directory API action project in SAP Build Process Automation with IAS destination. we are executing the creates a user resource action within Automation where we are getting the below error :

The provided destination does not follow the expected structure. Please contact support.

Note : when are executing this action directly from connectors out of the automation we are able to create use id successfully.

Could you please Help or suggest any solution on this error, how we can resolve it.

Thanks,

Rupesh
